public_reputation: Known around Ashforge Citadel through day-to-day work as innkeeper.
appearance: Valen Chaincourt usually presents in layered civic fabric cut to show rank without inviting touch, with details that make their innkeeper status legible before introductions begin.
manner: Reads people fast, keeps hospitality practical, and measures danger by what it does to ordinary routine. In Ashforge Citadel, that habit reads through the public pressures of the place rather than decorative flourish.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of innkeeper in and around Ashforge Citadel, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Ashforge Citadel workable through the obligations of innkeeper while managing the immediate pressure of house rivalry, forge accidents, ashfall damage.
hidden_pressure: Must keep the role of innkeeper credible while absorbing the strain created by house rivalry, forge accidents, ashfall damage.

adventure_hooks.summary: Valen Chaincourt can draw the party into a locality problem centered on innkeeper duties in Ashforge Citadel.
Valen Chaincourt becomes useful when the party needs grounded help with house rivalry, forge accidents, ashfall damage around Ashforge Citadel.

support_scope_notes: Created in V33_1 to ensure every locality-facing NPC access role resolves to a proper named person while remaining sparse and canon-safe. V33_1 additive depth pass preserved canon while strengthening at-table identity, appearance, and social motive.
public_signal: In public, Valen Chaincourt is immediately readable as a innkeeper tied to Ashforge Citadel.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Ashforge Citadel: ordinary workspaces, public counters, roads, docks, shrines, workshops, or other role-relevant spaces
who_seeks_them_out: people who need access or clarity

first_impression: Valen Chaincourt presents as someone shaped by the duties of a innkeeper and the daily pressures of Ashforge Citadel.
what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for the work of a innkeeper, and proof that strangers will not make Ashforge Citadel harder to manage.
what_they_refuse: Valen Chaincourt refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.
how_they_create_problems: By enforcing the expectations of a innkeeper too rigidly, protecting local reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
how_they_can_help: Can surface gossip, shelter, and the social temperature of a place without formal inquiry.
escalation_if_crossed: If crossed, Valen Chaincourt adds scrutiny, delay, and locality-specific friction before direct punishment.
rumor_about_them: People say Valen Chaincourt always knows more about Ashforge Citadel than is immediately visible.
best_first_scene: A first encounter works best when the party needs guidance, access, or relief tied to a innkeeper in Ashforge Citadel.
